ghats.name: Ramkund Ghat
ghats.significance_en: Most sacred ghat — where Lord Ram bathed during exile. Primary Kumbh Mela bathing ghat. The Asthi Vilaya Kund is here for final rites immersion.
ghats.significance_hi: सबसे पवित्र घाट — जहां भगवान राम ने वनवास के दौरान स्नान किया था। कुंभ मेला का प्राथमिक स्नान घाट।
ghats.significance_mr: सर्वात पवित्र घाट — जिथे भगवान रामांनी वनवासात स्नान केले होते.
ghats.bathing_rules_en: No soap or shampoo in the river. Men: dhoti preferred. Women: saree or salwar kameez. No swimming — designated bathing spots marked.

ghats.name: Astivahini Ghat (Asthi Sangam)
ghats.significance_en: Used specifically for immersion of ashes (asthi visarjan) of deceased. One of the most sacred places for final rites. Brahmins available for conducting rituals (puja).

ghats.name: Gorha Ghat (Gorakhpur Ghat)
ghats.significance_en: Managed by Gorakhnath Akhara. Beautiful ghat with old temples on the banks.

ghats.name: Sita Gufa Ghat
ghats.significance_en: Near Sita Gufa (cave where Sita lived). Quiet, less crowded compared to Ramkund.

ghats.name: Kushavart Kund (Trimbakeshwar)
ghats.significance_en: The source tank of Godavari River. Second main Kumbh Mela bathing site after Ramkund. Very sacred — bathing here is equivalent to bathing at the source of the river.
ghats.significance_hi: गोदावरी नदी का उद्गम स्थल टैंक। रामकुंड के बाद दूसरा मुख्य कुंभ मेला स्नान स्थल।

main_station.name: Nashik Road Railway Station
main_station.to_city_en: From station: MSRTC bus (₹15, 30 min) | Auto (₹150-200) | OLA/Uber Cab (₹200-250)
main_station.to_city_hi: स्टेशन से: MSRTC बस (₹15, 30 मिनट) | ऑटो (₹150-200) | OLA/Uber कैब (₹200-250)

kumbh_special_trains.en: Indian Railways will run Kumbh Special trains during Shahi Snan dates from Mumbai, Pune, Delhi, Ahmedabad, Surat, Hyderabad, Bangalore, and Chennai. Check IRCTC website for schedules closer to event.
kumbh_special_trains.hi: भारतीय रेलवे शाही स्नान की तारीखों में मुंबई, पुणे, दिल्ली, अहमदाबाद, सूरत, हैदराबाद, बेंगलुरू और चेन्नई से कुंभ विशेष ट्रेनें चलाएगा।

main_bus_stand.name: CBS Bus Stand (Central Bus Stand)
main_bus_stand.kumbh_note: During Kumbh, MSRTC will park shuttle buses at city entry points. Private vehicles restricted in Panchavati area on Shahi Snan days.

city_buses.en: City bus routes connect all major areas. Route 1: CBS to Nashik Road Station. Route 5: CBS to Panchavati. Route 8: CBS to Trimbak Road. Fare: ₹10-25.
city_buses.hi: शहर की बस सेवाएं सभी प्रमुख क्षेत्रों को जोड़ती हैं। मार्ग 1: CBS से नाशिक रोड स्टेशन। मार्ग 5: CBS से पंचवटी। किराया: ₹10-25।

airport.name: Nashik Ozar Airport (Gandhinagar Airport)
airport.flights: Limited — Mumbai and Delhi flights. Major airports: Mumbai (4hrs by road) or Pune (5hrs) for more connectivity.
airport.to_city_en: Cab from airport to Nashik city: ₹600-800 (45 min)

auto_rickshaw.en: Most common within city. Meter or fixed fare. Panchavati to CBS Stand: ₹50-80. CBS to Railway Station: ₹150-200.
auto_rickshaw.hi: शहर में सबसे आम। मीटर या निश्चित किराया। पंचवटी से CBS स्टैंड: ₹50-80।

ola_uber.en: Ola and Uber available in Nashik. Slightly cheaper than auto for longer distances. App-based booking.
ola_uber.note: During Kumbh peak days surge pricing applies

e_rickshaw.en: Electric rickshaws operate in Panchavati and ghat areas. Eco-friendly, ₹10-20 per person.
e_rickshaw.kumbh_note: During Kumbh Mela, only e-rickshaws allowed within 500m of ghats to reduce pollution

shuttle_kumbh.en: During Kumbh Mela, official MSRTC shuttle buses operate from designated parking areas to ghats. Free for pilgrims on Shahi Snan days.
shuttle_kumbh.hi: कुंभ मेला के दौरान, आधिकारिक MSRTC शटल बसें निर्दिष्ट पार्किंग क्षेत्रों से घाटों तक चलती हैं। शाही स्नान के दिन तीर्थयात्रियों के लिए मुफ्त।

parking.en: During Kumbh: Private vehicles parked at city periphery lots (Rajwada Chowk, Dwarka Circle, Tapovan area). Shuttle service to ghats. Panchavati area vehicle-free zone during Shahi Snan.
parking.hi: कुंभ के दौरान: निजी वाहन शहर की परिधि पर पार्किंग स्थलों पर (राजवाड़ा चौक, द्वारका सर्किल, तपोवन क्षेत्र)।

roads.from_mumbai: Mumbai-Nashik Highway (NH 3/NH 160) via Igatpuri — 171 km, 3.5-4 hours
roads.from_surat: Surat to Nashik via Dhule — 300 km, 5-6 hours
roads.note: Expect heavy traffic on approach roads during Shahi Snan days. Leave 4-5 hours extra time.

budget_hotels.en: Budget hotels available in Panchavati and CBS Stand areas. Range: ₹500-1500/night. Book 3-4 months ahead for Kumbh period.

kumbh_tent_city.en: During Kumbh Mela, official Tent City is set up by Maharashtra Tourism near Tapovan area. AC and non-AC tents available. Book via Maharashtra Tourism website.
